claims: The skill includes monitoring scripts (check-github-issues.sh, check-openclaw-comments.sh, unified-monitor.sh, etc.) that perform actions unrelated to its primary purpose of safe command execution. These scripts monitor GitHub issues and OpenClaw comments, access external APIs, and send notifications to third-party services (Feishu) without being necessary for the core functionality of intercepting dangerous shell commands. This represents excessive data collection and external communication not required for the stated security purpose.
